# matrix_user (Data Source)

Reads a user's public profile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matrix_user" "alice" {
  user_id = "@alice:example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `avatar_url` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
